title: Bipolar Disorder

vignette.text: A 25-year-old man is brought by family for decreased sleep, rapid speech, and spending sprees over 5 days. He believes he will become a famous musician.

physicalExam.psychiatric: Euphoric mood, pressured speech, flight of ideas, grandiosity

questions.question: Minimum duration for manic episode?
questions.explanation: Mania requires ≥7 days (or any duration if hospitalization required). Hypomania = 4 days minimum.

keyTakeaways: Bipolar I = mania; Bipolar II = hypomania + depression
